# Zypet Nutrition

> Kenya's premier supplier of raw, frozen whole prey rabbit BARF diets and human-grade meat proteins for dogs and cats.

Zypet Nutrition provides species-appropriate raw pet food across three product lines: Whole Rabbit Prey (with fur, without fur, minced), Human-Grade Rabbit cuts, and Premium Chicken Products. Orders are placed via WhatsApp (+254 759 436 251). Payment via M-Pesa Till 5630044 or Payment on Delivery. Based at Venus Complex, Northern Bypass Road, Nairobi.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product range, pricing, benefits of BARF feeding, and ordering info.
- [FAQ](/faq): Feeding amounts, thawing, storage, delivery, and product safety questions.
